content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
note: Finished dynamic-default resolution. Final footprint in core.py: (1) new module-level _resolve_dynamic_option_defaults() function placed right before 'class Command:' (~line 843), (2) one line calling it inside Command.main() right after 'with self.make_context(...) as ctx:', (3) a small dict-default validation block in Option.__init__ placed right after 'self.show_envvar = show_envvar' and BEFORE the existing 'if __debug__:' block (i.e. before your batch_size validation at ~2658-2664 in the original numbering) - did not touch that block or Option.__init__'s signature/to_info_dict, (4) extended the existing Option.get_default override (the is_flag/flag_value one) with a dict-default branch, (5) tweaked Option.get_help_extra's show_default condition for '(dynamic)' text. Also made a small change in types.py's convert_type() to infer a sensible type from the dynamic-default's value mappings. All tests pass (739 passed). No overlap with your described batch_size edits. Wrote patch.txt with just these two files' diffs.
